signals.headline: South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's Annual Inflation Rises to 2.2% in March 2026 | YES | HIGH confidence**  
South Korea's annual inflation rate increased to 2.2% in March 2026 from 2.0% in the prior two months, below market forecasts of 2.4%, as reported by Statistics Korea and confirmed via Trading Economics—this marks the latest confirmed data point amid Middle East-driven energy volatility.[1]

signals.headline: **Technical breakout**: ETH is testing critical resistance levels with institutional whale accumulation occurring[4]
signals.raw:
**Technical breakout**: ETH is testing critical resistance levels with institutional whale accumulation occurring[4]

The search results also indicate cryptocurrency experts are bullish on Ethereum's long-term trajectory, with Standard Chartered predicting ETH could reach $40,000 by the next decade, while more conservative estimates place it closer to $10,000[1][3].
